create.title: Create Group Chat
create.description: Create a new group chat task and invite others to join the discussion
create.successDesc: You can now invite other members to join

inviteLink.title: Invite to Group Chat
inviteLink.description: Generate an invite link to share with others to join "{{taskTitle}}"
inviteLink.permanentNote: This link is permanent and can be revoked at any time
inviteLink.expiresNote: Link expires in {{hours}} hours. Generate a new one if needed.

invite.title: Join Group Chat
invite.description: You have been invited to join a group chat

members.title: Group Members
members.inviteLinkDescription: Use the group link to invite others to join the group chat. Anyone can join the group chat through this link and view historical messages.
members.notOwner: Only the task owner can create invite links

addMembers.title: Add Group Members
addMembers.allUnregistered: Selected users are not registered on the platform
addMembers.allAlreadyMembers: Selected users are already group members
addMembers.useInviteLink: Please use the invite link to invite these users
addMembers.unregisteredUsersTitle: The following users are not registered
addMembers.unregisteredUsersDesc: {{users}} have not logged into the platform and cannot be added directly
addMembers.showInviteLink: Some users failed to add. You can generate an invite link to share with them.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this group chat? This action cannot be undone.
